title: DELETE with TRIGGER causes an assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_t3(a INT, b INT, c INT);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_t2del AFTER DELETE ON fuzz_sqlite_t2 FOR EACH ROW BEGIN DELETE FROM fuzz_sqlite_t3 WHERE a = OLD.y;
key_bug_features: DELETE with TRIGGER on WITHOUT ROWID tables
